## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Scrunch analytics, Amplitude data insights, and strategize on improving SEO and content performance for Engine.com.](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Scrunch analytics provide valuable competitor insights, but require manual interpretation for actionable steps](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Amplitude data shows blog content influences conversions, with peak impact 3 weeks before conversion](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Implementing page attribute tagging in Amplitude will improve content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [AI-generated customer insights will help prioritize content creation and SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Topics

### Scrunch Analytics Review

  - [Insights tab aims to provide easier accessibility on where to focus time](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Manual interpretation required to extract actionable insights from competitor data](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Opportunity to create better content based on competitor visibility in specific clusters (e.g., 24/7 customer support)](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Amplitude Data Analysis

  - [Blog traffic shows consistent growth with periodic spikes every \~4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2090.0)
  - [Impact analysis chart reveals blog views tend to occur 3 weeks before conversion](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3010.0)
  - [Discrepancy noted between Amplitude and GA4 data, likely due to platform subdomain inclusion in GA4](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3329.0)

### Content Performance Tracking

  - [Current Amplitude setup lacks easy filtering for specific content groups](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2256.0)
  - [Proposal to implement page attribute tagging for better content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Tagging would allow for grouping by persona, product, or other relevant attributes](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2802.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Focus on increasing content specificity on product pages (e.g., travel policies)](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Utilize AI analysis tools to identify customer pain points and frequently asked questions](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Explore Reddit and other platforms to validate internal insights on customer needs](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)

### Analytics Challenges

  - [Importance of excluding known users and employees from conversion data](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3533.0)
  - [Need to balance alert systems to avoid noise while catching significant changes](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3578.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to share AI-generated customer insights document with Kyle's team](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3664.0)
  - [Implement page attribute tagging system in Amplitude for improved content analysis](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
  - [Kyle to explore Reddit and other platforms for additional customer insights](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3738.0)
  - [Continue refining prompts and prioritizing focus areas based on new data sources](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)
  - [Joel to investigate discrepancies between Amplitude and GA4 data for LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/s5qVNxxC93c2-oSduVFWVyzVpGjN49hT?tab=summary&timestamp=3338.0)
